structural_claim: Apparent diversity in nature emerges from underlying symmetries and their breaking

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Electromagnetic and weak forces are different manifestations of a single gauge symmetry that is spontaneously broken

supporting_results.result_name: Discovery of the W and Z bosons
supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Distinct forces emerge from spontaneous breaking of underlying gauge symmetries

supporting_results.result_name: Glauber's Quantum Theory of Optical Coherence
supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Classical optical phenomena emerge from quantum field correlations, with classical behavior as a symmetry-restricted special case
Apparent optical properties can be fundamentally altered by manipulating quantum interference, revealing underlying coherent structure
